first_run.rationale: The score did not change, and the mean score delta across all runs was zero. Both evaluations correctly identify the same fundamental mismatches between the candidate's experience (low C++, wrong domain, wrong tech stack) and the mandatory job requirements. The minor variations in the phrasing of strengths and concerns are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's suitability. The change in university from Bucharest to Zürich had no material effect on the outcome.
